name: Don't.
description:
“Do Not Answer the Door After 3:17 A.M”

The note came with the apartment. Taped to the inside of the front door. Written in neat, almost polite handwriting: “Do not answer the door after 3:17 A.M, no matter who It sounds like.”

★

˖ 𑣲 Creator's Note:.†

This bot isn't for roleplay and conversation. I created this only to share my short horror stories.
